title: Cloud Engineer I
description: TechCorp Solutions is hiring a Cloud Engineer I to help us scale internal platform services used by product teams across multiple business units. This role is ideal for an early-career engineer who has already worked with AWS in production and wants to deepen their expertise in cloud operations, infrastructure automation, and service reliability. You will partner with senior engineers to maintain deployment pipelines, improve cloud cost visibility, and support migration efforts from legacy VM-based workloads to containerized services. Success in this role means strong ownership, clear communication, and a practical mindset for balancing reliability with delivery speed.
responsibilities: Support daily operations for AWS-based services including incident triage and post-incident follow-up.
Implement infrastructure changes through pull requests and collaborate on peer reviews.
Maintain CI/CD workflows and improve deployment safety checks.
Contribute to internal runbooks and architecture documentation.
Assist with cost-optimization initiatives and resource-rightsizing projects.
minimumQualifications: Hands-on experience with AWS core services (EC2, S3, IAM, VPC).
Experience writing scripts in Python or Bash.
Comfortable working in Linux environments and troubleshooting service issues.
Understanding of Git workflows and CI/CD fundamentals.
preferredQualifications: Experience with observability tools such as CloudWatch, Grafana, or Datadog.

title: Cloud Engineer II
description: As a Cloud Engineer II, you will own end-to-end delivery of cloud infrastructure patterns that power dozens of engineering squads. You will shape standards for infrastructure-as-code, security controls, and deployment architecture while mentoring less experienced teammates. This role includes meaningful design responsibility and close partnership with security, developer productivity, and application teams.
responsibilities: Design and implement reusable Terraform modules for common infrastructure patterns.
Improve Kubernetes cluster reliability and scaling behavior.
Lead root-cause analysis for production incidents and drive corrective actions.
Define guardrails for secure cloud deployments in partnership with security engineering.
Coach engineers on observability best practices and SLO management.
minimumQualifications: Production experience with AWS and Kubernetes-based workloads.
Strong Terraform skills and infrastructure code review experience.
Experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines.
Demonstrated ability to troubleshoot distributed systems issues.
preferredQualifications: Knowledge of cost optimization and cloud governance frameworks.
Experience mentoring junior cloud or DevOps engineers.

title: Senior Cloud Engineer
description: CloudFirst is seeking a Senior Cloud Engineer to lead architecture modernization across our customer-facing SaaS platform. You will drive high-impact initiatives around multi-region resiliency, deployment automation, and service performance optimization. The ideal candidate has a strong systems perspective, can evaluate tradeoffs quickly, and is comfortable influencing architecture decisions across multiple teams.
responsibilities: Lead architecture reviews for platform-level cloud initiatives.
Define infrastructure standards and enforce best practices through tooling and policy.
Partner with application teams to improve reliability and deployment velocity.
Design and execute disaster recovery and resilience testing plans.
Mentor senior and mid-level engineers on cloud engineering practices.
minimumQualifications: Extensive hands-on experience with AWS in production.
Deep Terraform and Kubernetes operational expertise.
Strong experience with incident management and operational excellence.
Proven ability to lead cross-functional technical projects.
preferredQualifications: Public speaking or technical writing contributions.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: StartupXYZ is growing quickly and needs a DevOps Engineer who thrives in fast-moving product environments. You will own CI/CD pipeline quality, deployment observability, and core operational tooling for engineering teams shipping features daily. This role suits someone who combines automation-first thinking with practical incident response experience.
responsibilities: Maintain and optimize CI/CD pipelines
Improve release reliability and rollback strategies
Own deployment observability and alert tuning
Create internal platform tooling for developers
minimumQualifications: 3+ years in DevOps/SRE
Strong Linux and scripting skills
Experience with containerized deployment workflows

title: Data Engineer
description: DataFlow Analytics is hiring a Data Engineer to build reliable, production-grade data pipelines supporting analytics and machine learning teams. You will design ingestion architecture, enforce data quality standards, and partner with stakeholders to model datasets for high-impact reporting and experimentation use cases.
responsibilities: Build scalable ETL/ELT pipelines
Implement data quality checks and lineage tracking
Optimize warehouse models for performance and cost
Collaborate with analytics and ML teams
minimumQualifications: Strong Python and SQL proficiency
Experience with Airflow or equivalent orchestrator
Production Spark or distributed data processing experience

title: Senior Data Engineer
description: In this senior role, you will lead architecture decisions for streaming and batch data systems serving multiple products. You will work closely with product analytics, data science, and governance teams to create trusted, scalable datasets and standards that improve developer productivity and business confidence in data.
responsibilities: Architect and evolve batch + streaming pipeline foundations
Lead schema evolution and data contracts
Set standards for data observability and reliability
Mentor engineers and drive technical roadmap execution
minimumQualifications: Advanced experience in distributed data systems
Hands-on Kafka and Spark expertise
Ability to lead large technical initiatives

title: Full Stack Developer
description: WebScale Co is looking for a Full Stack Developer to build customer-facing web experiences and backend services used by SMB customers globally. You will collaborate with design, product, and platform teams to ship features with measurable business impact.
responsibilities: Build front-end features in React
Develop backend APIs in Node.js
Write tests and participate in code reviews
Collaborate with product and design
minimumQualifications: Professional JavaScript development experience
Experience building APIs and relational data models

title: Backend Engineer
description: API Masters is hiring a Backend Engineer to design, ship, and operate high-throughput APIs for enterprise clients. You will work on distributed services where performance, reliability, and correctness are critical.
responsibilities: Design robust API contracts
Implement resilient service patterns
Optimize service/database performance
Contribute to reliability engineering practices
minimumQualifications: Strong backend programming background
Experience with SQL optimization
Understanding of distributed systems tradeoffs

title: Security Engineer
description: SecureNet Systems seeks a Security Engineer to strengthen cloud and application security posture across internal and customer-facing systems. You will blend detection engineering, vulnerability management, and secure design guidance.
responsibilities: Develop detection content and response playbooks
Partner on secure architecture reviews
Drive vulnerability remediation workflows
Support compliance audit readiness
minimumQualifications: Security operations or security engineering experience
Strong understanding of cloud and network security controls

title: Junior Cloud Engineer
description: CloudStart is looking for a Junior Cloud Engineer eager to grow in cloud infrastructure and production support. You will rotate through platform projects and receive mentorship from senior cloud engineers while contributing to real operational work from day one.
responsibilities: Assist with cloud environment maintenance
Support monitoring/alerting configuration
Document operational runbooks
Participate in on-call shadowing
minimumQualifications: Foundational AWS knowledge
Basic scripting skills
Interest in cloud operations
preferredQualifications: Internship or project experience with containers

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Visionary AI Labs is hiring an ML Engineer to productionize models for recommendation and ranking systems used in consumer applications. You will work across model lifecycle tooling, feature engineering pipelines, and model-serving infrastructure.
responsibilities: Deploy and monitor ML models in production
Build reusable ML pipeline components
Collaborate with data scientists on model readiness
Improve model observability and drift detection
minimumQualifications: Strong software engineering foundations
Experience with model deployment and monitoring
Solid data engineering fundamentals
preferredQualifications: Feature store or experiment platform exposure

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: NorthStar Commerce is seeking an SRE to improve reliability for high-traffic e-commerce services. You will focus on service-level objectives, incident management processes, and automation that reduces operational toil.
responsibilities: Define and monitor SLOs
Lead incident response improvements
Automate operational tasks
Partner with product teams on reliability objectives
minimumQualifications: Experience running production Kubernetes workloads
Strong debugging and incident response skills

title: Platform Engineer
description: Harbor Fintech is expanding our platform engineering group to build secure, developer-friendly infrastructure for regulated financial workloads. You will define golden paths for service deployment and strengthen access/security controls across engineering environments.
responsibilities: Build internal developer platform capabilities
Create secure deployment templates
Improve infrastructure governance and policy automation
Partner with security/compliance teams
minimumQualifications: Strong IaC and cloud platform experience
Experience in regulated or compliance-focused environments

title: Cloud Security Engineer
description: BlueShield Digital is hiring a Cloud Security Engineer to harden cloud infrastructure and improve security telemetry across all product environments. This role is hands-on and strategic, blending implementation work with security architecture guidance.
responsibilities: Implement cloud security controls
Automate security checks in CI/CD
Partner with engineering teams on remediation
Support audit and compliance programs
minimumQualifications: Hands-on cloud security engineering experience
Strong understanding of IAM and network segmentation

title: Frontend Engineer (React)
description: Lattice Learning is looking for a Frontend Engineer to build engaging, accessible learning experiences for students and educators. You will collaborate closely with product design and backend teams to ship polished features and improve UI performance.
responsibilities: Build complex UI workflows in React
Improve frontend test coverage
Partner on component library evolution
Optimize web performance and accessibility
minimumQualifications: Strong React and JavaScript/TypeScript experience
Experience with frontend testing tools

title: Product Data Analyst
description: Beacon Apps is seeking a Product Data Analyst to generate actionable insights for product and growth teams. You will design analyses, define key metrics, and partner with PMs and engineers to evaluate feature impact through experimentation.
responsibilities: Build dashboards and reporting layers
Design and analyze A/B tests
Define metric frameworks for product initiatives
Communicate insights to technical and non-technical stakeholders
minimumQualifications: Strong SQL and analytical reasoning
Experience with product metrics and experimentation

title: IT Systems Administrator
description: MetroHealth Partners is hiring an IT Systems Administrator to maintain and improve endpoint, identity, and server infrastructure supporting clinical and business operations. The role combines daily operational support with systems improvement projects.
responsibilities: Administer AD and endpoint platforms
Maintain server patching and backup operations
Support user access and identity workflows
Automate repetitive operational tasks
minimumQualifications: Systems administration experience in mixed Windows/Linux environments
Strong troubleshooting skills
preferredQualifications: Healthcare IT or regulated environment experience

title: QA Automation Engineer
description: Velocity Commerce is seeking a QA Automation Engineer to improve release quality across web and API surfaces. You will help establish scalable automation patterns and collaborate across engineering teams to reduce manual testing overhead.
responsibilities: Design and maintain automated test suites
Integrate tests into CI pipelines
Support release quality gates and defect triage
Drive quality improvements with engineers and PMs
minimumQualifications: Hands-on automation framework experience
Strong understanding of API and UI testing
